---
label: "Event Schema"
icon: "📃"
---

## Event Schema Design

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<ExpandableSection title="Event Design Best Practices" icon="💡">

- Use past tense for event types (document.classified, not classify.document)
- Include correlation IDs for tracing across agent chains
- Keep event payloads small -- include references, not full data
- Version your event schemas for backward compatibility
- Include processing metadata (time, confidence, model used)

</ExpandableSection>
